description: Real-time GPS location updates from drivers, persisted as position history and broadcast to subscribers for live map tracking.

actors.name: Driver
actors.description: Mobile device reporting location at regular intervals.

actors.name: Platform
actors.description: Server that receives, persists, and broadcasts location updates.

actors.name: Subscriber
actors.description: Dashboard, customer app, or operator console receiving live location updates.

fields.name: driver_id
fields.label: Identifier of the driver whose location is being updated.

fields.name: altitude
fields.label: Altitude above sea level in meters.

fields.name: speed
fields.label: Current speed in meters per second.

fields.name: order_id
fields.label: Active order this position update is associated with.

fields.name: destination_id
fields.label: Current waypoint/destination the driver is heading toward.

rules.rule_01: The driver app sends location updates on a regular interval (typically every few seconds while active).
rules.rule_02: Each update overwrites the driver's current location in the driver record.
rules.rule_03: A new position history record is only created if the driver has moved more than 50 meters from the last recorded position, or if no prior position exists.
rules.rule_04: Every location update triggers a broadcast event to the channel keyed on the driver's public identifier.
rules.rule_05: Subscribers listen on a per-driver channel to receive real-time location pushes.
rules.rule_06: Reverse geocoding to refresh city and country is throttled — only runs if 10+ minutes have elapsed since last geocode or if city/country are empty.
rules.rule_07: Location updates include the current active order and destination waypoint when available, enabling route tracking.

given: driver sends a location update with latitude and longitude

then.description: Driver's current position is updated with new coordinates.

location_updated.result: All subscribers on the driver's channel receive the new position in real time.

given: driver has moved more than 50 meters from last recorded position OR no prior position exists

then.description: A new position history record is written with coordinates, heading, speed, altitude, current order, and destination.

position_history_recorded.result: A persistent trail of driver positions is recorded for replay and audit.

given: 10 or more minutes have passed since last geocode, OR city or country fields are empty

then.description: City is resolved from coordinates via reverse geocoding.
Country code is resolved from coordinates.

geocode_refreshed.result: Driver's city and country are kept current for zone and routing logic.

given: provided driver_id does not match any driver record
driver_not_found.result: Update is rejected with an error response.

errors.message: Invalid coordinates provided for location update.

events.name: driver.location_changed
events.description: Fired on every driver location update; broadcast to the driver's real-time channel.

related.reason: Location updates are linked to the active order for trip tracking.
The driver app is the source of location updates.
ETA is recalculated using updated driver position.
Zone entry/exit events can be derived from location changes.

goals.description: Real-time GPS location updates from drivers, persisted as position history and broadcast to subscribers for live map tracking.

success_metrics.measurement: Successful operations divided by total attempts
Errors that auto-recover without manual intervention

constraints.description: Must degrade gracefully when dependencies are unavailable

tradeoffs.reason: integration failures can cascade across systems
